---
title: "ENV S 193DS Final"
format: pdf
author: "Aylin Orozco"
date: "06-09-2026"
---

GitHub Repository: [here](https://github.com/aylin224/ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final.git)

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)

data <- read_csv(here("data/nest_data_final.csv"))
```
